body: Bitcoin Price: BTC Is Up 19% in 30 Days — Is the Bear Market Officially Over? - ... Bitcoin Pushes Over $80k as Oil-BTC Relationship Steps Aside

# Bitcoin Price: BTC Is Up 19% in 30 Days — Is the Bear Market Officially Over? Bitcoin’s 19% rally over the past 30 days was driven by three catalysts: the April 6 Iran ceasefire negotiation report, Morgan Stanley’s spot Bitcoin ETF launch on April 8, and Strategy’s $2.54 billion BTC purchase on April 22. CryptoQuant’s Bull Score Index briefly hit neutral on April 22 for the first time since Bitcoin peaked at $126,000 last October, before dropping back to bearish territory by the end of the month. Bitcoin has never closed three consecutive green months in a bear-market year (2014, 2018, 2022), making May the deciding test after March barely closed green at +0.19% and April finished up +11.87%. A sustained close above the 200-day moving average at $82,228 or a green May close would be the first solid confirmation that the Bitcoin bear market bottom is in. Now the BTC price is at $80,200, up 19% over the past 30 days, and trading above $80,000 for the first time since January.
Bitcoin Likely Starting the Final Leg Down of the CRASH - Once Done BTC will get a Bear Market Rally. 6.1K views · 3 days ago. #bitcoin #btc #
